moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Live
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green is buzzing as TRNSMT Festival kicks off, running from June 19-21 with headliners like Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Live from Glasgow
angles.copy: TRNSMT is LIVE! Who are you buzzing to see on Glasgow Green this weekend? Drop your favourite acts!

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Festival season is officially ON! TRNSMT is bringing the noise to Glasgow all weekend. What's your go-to festival anthem?

angles.name: Headliner Spotlight
angles.copy: Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, Lewis Capaldi... TRNSMT is stacked! Who's taking your top spot this year?

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival runs from June 18-21, featuring huge names like Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, and The Cure.

source.l: Isle of Wight Festival Official Site

angles.name: Island Vibes
angles.copy: Sun's out, tunes are loud! The Isle of Wight Festival is in full swing. What's your must-see act?

angles.name: Festival Flashback
angles.copy: From legendary acts to today's chart-toppers, the Isle of Wight Festival always delivers. Who's your all-time favourite IOW performer?

moments.title: Parklife Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Manchester's Heaton Park is hosting Parklife Festival this weekend, June 20-21, bringing a huge lineup of music across multiple stages.

angles.name: Manchester's Party
angles.copy: Parklife is ON! Heaton Park is buzzing with the best in dance and pop all weekend. Who are you there for?

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs tomorrow, Sunday, June 21, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the longest day of the year! Tomorrow is the Summer Solstice. How will you be making the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Sunrise Watch
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the sun rises on the Summer Solstice at 9:24 AM BST. Will you be up early to catch the dawn?

moments.title: Wimbledon Begins Next Week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 are set to begin on Monday, June 29, running for two weeks at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon kicks off next Monday. Who are you backing for the titles this year?

angles.name: Anticipation Builds
angles.copy: Just over a week until the grass courts open! The greatest tennis tournament is nearly here. What's your favourite Wimbledon moment?

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, is well underway, airing Sunday to Friday at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX, bringing daily villa drama.

angles.name: Villa Latest
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of drama from the Love Island villa! Who's coupling up and who's causing chaos tonight?

angles.name: Hot Takes
angles.copy: Love Island is providing all the talking points! What's your biggest villa prediction for this week?

moments.title: Taylor Swift Tops UK Chart
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It I Knew You' is currently the UK's Official Singles Chart Number 1, as of the chart week ending June 25, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: It's official: Taylor Swift is still at Number 1 on the UK Singles Chart! Is 'I Knew It I Knew You' your favourite right now?

angles.name: Pop Dominance
angles.copy: Another week, another chart-topper for Taylor Swift! What's your go-to track from the current UK Top 40?

moments.title: Happy 77th Lionel Richie
moments.blurb: Music legend Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday today, June 20, 2026. He was born in 1949.

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Lionel Richie, who turns 77 today! What's your favourite song from the 'Hello' singer?

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: 77 years young today! Lionel Richie has given us so many unforgettable hits. Which one always gets you singing along?

moments.title: Lana Del Rey Turns 41
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey celebrates her 41st birthday tomorrow, June 21, 2026. She was born in 1985.

angles.name: Birthday Queen
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Lana Del Rey turns 41! What's your ultimate Lana track?

angles.name: Iconic Sound
angles.copy: Happy almost birthday to Lana Del Rey! From 'Video Games' to 'Summertime Sadness', her sound is unmistakable. What's your favourite era?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Pop icon Cyndi Lauper will celebrate her 73rd birthday on Monday, June 22, 2026. She was born in 1953.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Have Fun
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Cyndi Lauper turns 73 on Monday. Which of her hits is your absolute favourite?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Still shining bright! Cyndi Lauper's music defined an era. What's the first song that comes to mind when you think of her?

moments.title: Ariana Grande Turns 33
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday on Thursday, June 26, 2026. She was born in 1993.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Next Thursday, Ariana Grande turns 33! What's your ultimate track from the pop sensation?

angles.name: Thank U, Next!
angles.copy: From Nickelodeon to global pop star, Ariana Grande has done it all. What's your favourite era of her music ahead of her 33rd birthday?
